title: Debris Chunk(Raw Netherite Scrap)
description: Add Debris Chunk(Raw Netherite scrap),the raw materials form of Ancient Debris.
body:
Debris Chunk Add raw materials form of Ancient Debris——Debris Chunk ,so that Fortune can be use on Ancient Debris.

In the same way,Debris Chunk also add Debris Dust,Debris Nugget, Debris Chunk Block,and some recipes to support some other mods,including：

- [Thermal Series](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-foundation)

- [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct)

- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

- [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering)

- [Crossroads](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crossroads-mc)(Not currently on Modrinth.)

- Upcoming other mods support...

Versions below 0.1.0 need to install [Json Things](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/json-things), which is not currently on Modrinth.
